Our Concept

Healthy Food
That Tastes
Exceptional.

Bowlé is Kigali's modern healthy food concept — where every meal is crafted specifically for you. We use fresh, high-quality ingredients to build customizable salad, rice, and pasta bowls that are as nourishing as they are satisfying.

Whether you're a busy professional or a fitness-conscious diner, Bowlé delivers a premium experience at the speed you need.

The Bowls

Crafted With Care

Spaghetti Bolognese
Rich bolognese slow-cooked to perfection, layered over silky spaghetti and finished with freshly grated parmesan. Every strand carries the warmth of a proper Italian tradition.
Signature Salad Bowls
Colour, texture, and nutrition in every handful. Each salad bowl is built from the freshest greens and dressed with intention — a meal that looks as good as it tastes.
Modern Dining Space
A calm, clean setting designed for those who appreciate quality. Whether you're working through lunch or catching up over a bowl, the space moves with you.
The Open Kitchen
Watch your bowl come together in real time. Transparency is part of the experience — you see every ingredient that goes into your meal, every single time.
Bowlé — Kigali
Bright, welcoming, and unmistakably Bowlé. A restaurant that wears its identity proudly — from the deep forest-green walls to the warmth of natural wood.
